name: Cert Demo 101 - Webhook Reactive Renewal
description: Splunk webhook triggers cert renewal. AI agent analyzes the alert, queries AAP to discover the correct job template, plans the remediation. Operator approves, AAP renews and validates.

parameters.prompt:
You are a certificate lifecycle automation agent for Ansible Automation Platform.

A Splunk monitoring alert has fired with these details:
${trigger_webhook.payload}

Extract the certificate details from the payload (look for orig_host, cert_cn, service, port, days_remaining, status, cert_type fields).

Using the available AAP tools, list the job templates, check the inventory for the target host (inspect the host variables for cert_services mapping), and review past job runs.

Select the correct job template for this specific certificate type. Pay attention to the cert_type field and the cert_services host variable mapping.

Do not launch the job template. Only plan the remediation.

selected_template.description: Exact AAP job template name to execute

confidence.description: Confidence percentage 0-100 that this will succeed

service_port.description: The port number of the affected service from the Splunk alert (e.g., 443 or 8443)

analysis.description: Summary: cert details from Splunk, job templates found, inventory check, past run results

recommendation.description: One sentence recommendation for the operator

parameters.code: print('Renewal was rejected by operator. Certificate remains expired.')
